home.heroSubtitle: Reliable implementation of your oil and gas strategy
home.locationsSubtitle: Operating across major oil and gas regions
home.locationsDescription: The Company's core business activities are drilling of oil and gas wells and a full range of rig-up services. The Company operates across Nigeria's key oil and gas basins, including the Niger Delta, onshore and offshore fields in Rivers, Delta, and Bayelsa States.
home.locationsMapCaption: Operating across key oil and gas basins with rig-up, drilling, and service support.
home.locationsAreaList: Niger Delta Region|Rivers & Bayelsa States|Delta & Edo States|Lagos & Offshore Blocks
home.locationsProjectTitle: Complex well construction and servicing across Nigerian basins
home.managementQuoteChairman: Blueflare Energy is one of the key drilling contractors in Nigeria's Niger Delta, operating across Rivers, Delta, and Bayelsa States. The Company remains on the path of sustainable growth outlined by our long-term business strategy.
home.managementQuoteCeo: Safety, efficiency, and innovation drive everything we do. Our operations teams work to deliver stable results in difficult formations while maintaining the highest production and industrial standards.

about.title: About the Company
about.description: We are a leading provider of drilling and oilfield services with decades of experience in the industry.
